reviews.review_description:
Zephyrus is a fun adventure puzzle game that uses the powers of the elements to fight, solve puzzles and unlock new areas of the map.

The game is still in the early stages but shows a lot of promise for a fun single player or multiplayer magical adventure. 

The puzzles of the game are not over challenging and are more of a quest to find the items you need to proceed onward. You will wield the powers of the elements, to solve puzzles and unlock new areas of the map.

This is a fun adventure puzzle game where you try to get the best time on each level. There are puzzles to solve, items to find and dungeons to crawl.

The game right now has 3 level to play through, with more on the way. You can go a t it alone or team up with a friend. Either way you play, you will have fun. The game also offers smooth locomotion and teleportation for movement. This way everyone can play at a comfort level they like.

If you are looking for a brain challenging puzzle game, this one my not be for you. These puzzles are more easy and fun to solve, sort of a quest to get what you need to complete each puzzle. If you are looking for some good adventurous fun with magic mixed in this is a game for you. 

This game has promise and a good road map ahead. Adventure and magic lovers should check this one out. 

Watch my preview here,
https://youtu.be/KW-FGyHFU5M

developer_response.body: Hi IronbugVR, Thank you for your time and patience in going through all of the game and for the video as well! :)

reviews.review_description:
I accidentally found this game on Steam as Early Access and I'm glad it's available here! I was stunned by the atmosphere, it was a bit like being in Miyazaki's world! The graphics are stunning on Quest 2. For the price, I think it's worth it to dive into this world. The puzzles are fun, but also quite easy. The spells that change the environment are brilliant! Sometimes I would giggle when I messed up the spells, because something always happened :) The new teleportation was fun. I want to try the coop mode as soon as I can, because I saw in the menu that there is an option for that, but only through wifi. 

What I miss is that I'd love to cast spells on creatures, but I read on the developers site that this game is still in development and they are working on some combat modes.
I do miss the hand interaction, but the magic pointer is a neat idea, it makes life easier for the seated players, including mine.

Pro
- Atmosphere (graphics, music)
- Effect of magic on the environment
- Fun effects on our Avatar
- Fun ending of puzzles
- In-game menu
- Optional Avatars
- I didn't run into any major bugs
- Cheap

Con (knowing that it's still in development)
- Few maps
- Lack of hand interaction
- No online mode only wifi
- Lack of story in the game, but I think this can be addressed in the future (I hope)

I'm curious to see where it will evolve and look forward to seeing the game expanded as soon as possible! Good luck for the developers!

developer_response.body:
Dear Kuglyy, 
"WOW! I want more!" ...of this detailed feedback :)
We would first like to thank you for your thorough feedback and comments.
Have to admit the game is still in the development phase and even if there are key points we have to consider the final product will be what users transform it into.
Updates and new challenges are on the way. Visit our Discord, for the latest news.
